name: Zhejiang Gongdong Medical Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Gongdong Medical Technology Co.,Ltd. develops, produces, and sells medical devices and medical testing supplies in China. Its products include lab consumables, vacuum blood collection systems, specimen collection systems, medical nursing wares, medicine package wares, nd mold customization products. Zhejiang Gongdong Medical Technology Co.,Ltd.was founded in 1985 and is based in Taizhou, China.
